headline: PELOSI ANNOUNCES FORMAL IMPEACHMENT INQUIRY
notes: Speaker Pelosi launches impeachment inquiry into Trump

headline: TRUMP IMPEACHED: ABUSE OF POWER AND OBSTRUCTION
notes: First Trump impeachment by the House

headline: TRUMP ACQUITTED IN IMPEACHMENT TRIAL
notes: Senate acquits Trump on both articles

headline: TRUMP'S TAXES SHOW CHRONIC LOSSES AND YEARS OF TAX AVOIDANCE
notes: NYT publishes Trump tax records investigation

headline: TRUMP AND FIRST LADY TEST POSITIVE FOR CORONAVIRUS
notes: Trump announces positive COVID test

headline: TRUMP HEADS TO HOSPITAL FOR 'FEW DAYS'; GETS EXPERIMENTAL CARE
notes: Trump transferred to Walter Reed after COVID diagnosis

headline: TRUMP, HOSPITALIZED WITH VIRUS, SAID TO HAVE 'CONCERNING' SYMPTOMS
notes: Reports of Trump's worsening condition at Walter Reed

headline: BIDEN BEATS TRUMP
notes: Biden wins 2020 presidential election

headline: PRO-TRUMP MOB STORMS CAPITOL, HALTING VOTE CERTIFICATION
notes: January 6 Capitol attack begins

headline: MOB INCITED BY TRUMP STORMS CAPITOL
notes: Updated headline as events unfolded on January 6

headline: TRUMP IMPEACHED AGAIN
notes: Second Trump impeachment by the House

headline: BIDEN IS SWORN IN AS 46TH PRESIDENT
notes: Biden inauguration

headline: 'DEMOCRACY HAS PREVAILED'
notes: Biden inauguration address quote

headline: TRUMP ACQUITTED
notes: Senate acquits Trump in second impeachment trial

headline: CUOMO TO RESIGN AMID SEXUAL HARASSMENT SCANDAL
notes: NY Governor Andrew Cuomo announces resignation

headline: KYIV BRACES FOR A RUSSIAN ATTACK
notes: Russia invades Ukraine

headline: RUSSIAN TROOPS ENTER KYIV
notes: Russian forces reach the capital

headline: BATTLE FOR KYIV
notes: Fighting in and around Ukraine's capital

headline: RUSSIANS PRESS INTO SECOND-LARGEST CITY
notes: Russian forces advance on Kharkiv

headline: UKRAINE AGREES TO TALKS WITH RUSSIA
notes: First ceasefire/negotiation attempts

headline: BACKLASH AGAINST RUSSIA GROWS
notes: International sanctions and condemnation escalate

headline: RUSSIAN ROCKETS BATTER UKRAINE
notes: Intensified Russian bombardment

headline: ROCKET BARRAGE KILLS CIVILIANS
notes: Civilian casualties mount from Russian attacks

headline: EXPLOSION SHAKES CENTRAL KHARKIV
notes: Major strike on Ukraine's second-largest city

headline: CIVILIAN TOLL RISING IN ROCKET ATTACKS
notes: Escalating civilian casualties in Ukraine

headline: RUSSIA WARNS KYIV; ROCKETS HIT MAJOR CITIES
notes: Russia issues threats while attacking multiple cities

headline: EXPLOSIONS SHAKE 2 MAJOR CITIES IN UKRAINE
notes: Strikes on Kyiv and Kharkiv

headline: JACKSON CONFIRMED
notes: Ketanji Brown Jackson confirmed to the Supreme Court

headline: SUPREME COURT OVERTURNS ROE V. WADE
notes: Dobbs decision ends federal abortion rights

headline: TRUMP SOUGHT TO JOIN JAN. 6 MOB
notes: Jan. 6 committee hearing testimony

headline: STATE ABORTION BANS SWIFTLY TAKE EFFECT
notes: Trigger laws activated after Roe overturned

headline: QUEEN ELIZABETH II DIES AT 96
notes: Death of Britain's longest-reigning monarch. Wayback snapshot shows ALL CAPS text in LARGE banner with deck: 'Ruled for 7 Decades; Britain's Longest-Reigning Monarch'

headline: TRUMP GUILTY ON ALL COUNTS
notes: Trump convicted on 34 felony counts in Manhattan hush-money trial. Verified MEGA banner from Wayback Machine.

headline: BIDEN DROPS OUT AND BACKS HARRIS
notes: Biden withdraws from 2024 race and endorses VP Harris. Verified MEGA banner from Wayback Machine.

headline: TRUMP STORMS BACK
notes: Trump wins 2024 presidential election. Verified MEGA banner from Wayback Machine.

headline: 'TRUMP'S AMERICA'
notes: Post-election MEGA banner. bannerDeck: VICTORY CHANGES NATION'S SENSE OF ITSELF

headline: TRUMP IS SWORN IN AS 47TH PRESIDENT
notes: Trump inaugurated for second term. Verified ALL CAPS text in LARGE banner from Wayback Machine afternoon snapshot.

headline: POPE FRANCIS IS DEAD AT 88
notes: Death of Pope Francis on Easter Monday. Verified ALL CAPS text in LARGE banner from Wayback Machine.

headline: U.S. AND ISRAEL ATTACK IRAN
notes: US and Israeli strikes on Iran. Verified ALL CAPS text in LARGE banner from Wayback Machine. bannerDeck: Trump Calls for Overthrow of Government
